hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); RUFF=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/venv/bin/ruff; [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.py ]] && "$RUFF" check --fix --unsafe-fixes "$FILE" && "$RUFF" format "$FILE"; true

CMD=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(rm -rf [/~.]|git push --force|git push -f|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM)" && echo BLOCKED && exit 2 || exit 0
